bullets.text: Gateway URL changes mid-session (feed + tabs update without stale data).

assertions.test_name: uses the latest gateway URL when runtime settings change mid-session

bullets.text: WebSocket flaps (rapid disconnect/reconnect) without duplicating/exploding state.

assertions.test_name: schedules reconnect and re-attempts websocket connection

bullets.text: Malformed WS events do not crash UI (drop safely + optionally log).

assertions.test_name: connects and ignores malformed ws payloads

bullets.text: Tab reset does not wipe global app settings unintentionally.

assertions.test_name: reset tab state preserves global connection settings

bullets.text: Error recovery does not cause infinite crash loops.

assertions.test_name: enters safe mode only at threshold
increments crash count inside window and resets outside window

bullets.text: Copy/debug features are explicit and scrub secrets.

assertions.test_name: builds redacted error reports with event context

bullets.text: Wizard token-entry fields can be plaintext only during active onboarding entry; outside onboarding entry state, tokens must not be visible.

assertions.test_name: keeps onboarding token plaintext only during active entry and does not expose it after setup

bullets.text: If screenshots are taken, default view should not expose tokens (except operator-controlled active onboarding token-entry field).

assertions.test_name: keeps onboarding token plaintext only during active entry and does not expose it after setup

bullets.text: E2E avoids racey sleep patterns; waits on visible states or deterministic mocks.
E2E runs against deterministic stub gateway + websocket.
Tests do not require real provider OAuth flows (mock/stub those paths).
